Text.value: R100, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, antivalent output, cable 2 m, 4-pole
R100, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, M8 plug, 3-pin
R100, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, antivalent output, M8 plug, 4-pin
R100, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, M8 pigtail, 3-pin
R100, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, antivalent output, M8 pigtail, 4-pin
R100, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, antivalent output, M12 pigtail, 4-pin
R101, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, antivalent output, cable 2 m, 4-pole
R101, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, M8 plug, 3-pin
R101, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, antivalent output, M8 plug, 4-pin
R101, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, M8 pigtail, 3-pin
R101, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, antivalent output, M8 pigtail, 4-pin
R101, 1000 mm, active high (light-on), configurable, antivalent output, M12 pigtail, 4-pin
defines the switching delay for a on-to-off transition or the minimum on time after a off-to-on transition of the switching signal depending on the delay mode setting'
defines switching delay for a off-to-on transition of the switching signal
selects between a combination of on and off delay times or on and one-shot delay times
set point values for switching signal channel
defines the logical behaviour of the switching signal and derived output signal
a higher filtering improves stability in critical applications
defines the output or input characteristic at pin 2 or white wire
configuration of the specific function at the as output configured additional I/O terminal
configuration of the specific function at the as input configured additional I/O terminal
allows enabling or disabling specific functions controlled by process data
enabled: the emitter is controlled via process data output - a '1' at 'PD Output - Tansducer disable' disables the emitter, object detection is inhibited
enabled: the signal evaluation is controlled via process data output - a '1' at 'PDoutput - Evaluation Hold' stops signal evaluation, the last state will be maintained
different event sources can be en- or disabled
enabled: an event is generated if operating reserve is below configured threshold
enabled: an event is generated if sensor signals do not allow a valid evaluation
enabled: an event is generated if sensor signals are not valid due to e.g. heavy interferences
enabled: an event is generated if the emitter is set to test mode by a remote signal
allows setting the device into different operational states e.g. for diagnosis purposes
enables temporary adjustment or teach-in over local control elements
enables a defined flashing pattern of the indicator LEDs
provides additional tagging posibilities e.g. for a application or job configuration
shows the overall hours of operation
indicates operation at critical ambient temperatures or excess of specification limits
the minimum value of the specified detection range
the maximum value of the specified detection range
expresses the current signal level relative to the switching threshold
quality of the evaluated sensor signal, quality drops with weak signal or interference
current status of the switching signal
true: the emitter is disabled and object detection is not possible
true: local controls are temporary enabled for adjustment or teach-in in IO-Link mode
analog output on pin 2 / white wire
second signal in- / output on pin 2 / white wire
second signal in- / output / analog output on pin 2 / white wire
analog output on pin 2/wh, input signal on pin 5 / grey wire
second signal output on pin 2 / white, input signal on pin 5 / grey wire
second signal / analog output on pin 2 / white, input signal on pin 5 / grey wire
stability alarm - operating reserve too low
check sensor adjustment or clean surface
check sensor adjustment or target position
check for excessive ambient light interference
ambient temperature outside specified temperature range
device set to test mode by remote signal
Teach-in of setpoint 1 has been executed
Parameters are set to factory settings
